title: VPN access issue
description: Cannot connect to corporate VPN on home Wi‑Fi. Error: TLS handshake failed.

title: UI buttons overlap on mobile
description: On iPhone Safari, the action buttons overlap in the ticket detail view.

title: Request: Export ticket to PDF
description: Need ability to export ticket timeline (messages + metadata) as a PDF for audit purposes.

title: Large file upload crashes app
description: Uploading a 1.5GB zip causes the app to crash and reload.

messages.message: Please compress the file to < 500MB and retry. We are investigating memory limits.

title: Cache memory error and lag
description: Browser becomes slow after opening dashboard for a while. Suspect cache storage growth.

messages.message: Try clearing site data and disabling heavy extensions. We'll check client logs.
